title: A fast-changing world needs a strong Europe [Promoted Content]
summary_full: European agriculture is not a passive observer of the world’s turmoil. Over the past six years, it has absorbed – and reacted to – every turbulent event. In 2019, few could have predicted what was coming. By March 2020, COVID-19 had exposed the fragility of global supply chains and returned food security to the top […]
